description: Represents an AWS Signer signing job. Signing jobs are initiated via StartSigningJob and are read-only resources that provide visibility into code signing operations.

Arn.description: The ARN of the signing job.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

JobId.description: The ID of the signing job.
JobId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Source.description: The S3 bucket that contains the object to sign.
Source.markdownDescription:
The S3 bucket that contains the object to sign.

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ProfileName.description: The name of the signing profile.
ProfileName.markdownDescription:
The name of the signing profile.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 2  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{2,}$  
Update requires: Replacement

ProfileVersion.description: The version of the signing profile used to initiate the signing job.
ProfileVersion.markdownDescription:
The version of the signing profile used to initiate the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 10  
Maximum Length: 10  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]{10}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PlatformId.description: The microcontroller platform to which the signed code image will be distributed.
PlatformId.markdownDescription:
The microcontroller platform to which the signed code image will be distributed.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PlatformDisplayName.description: A human-readable name for the signing platform associated with the signing job.
PlatformDisplayName.markdownDescription:
A human-readable name for the signing platform associated with the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreatedAt.description: Date and time that the signing job was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
Date and time that the signing job was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CompletedAt.description: Date and time that the signing job was completed.
CompletedAt.markdownDescription:
Date and time that the signing job was completed.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

SignatureExpiresAt.description: The expiration timestamp for the signature generated by the signing job.
SignatureExpiresAt.markdownDescription:
The expiration timestamp for the signature generated by the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RequestedBy.description: The IAM principal that requested the signing job.
RequestedBy.markdownDescription:
The IAM principal that requested the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.markdownDescription:
Status of the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: InProgress | Failed | Succeeded  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

JobOwner.description: The AWS account ID of the job owner.
JobOwner.markdownDescription:
The AWS account ID of the job owner.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 12  
Maximum Length: 12  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

JobInvoker.description: The IAM entity that initiated the signing job.
JobInvoker.markdownDescription:
The IAM entity that initiated the signing job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 12  
Maximum Length: 12  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
